message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor Time
participant tradecenter
participant wms
entity "合作商仓储系统" as warehouse
entity "Aftership" as aftership

warehouse -->> wms : [010] 回传发货信息imei运单号等
wms -->> wms : [020] 生成运单信息
Time ->> wms : [030] 定时推送运单
wms ->> aftership : [040] 推送运单至aftership
aftership -->> wms : [050] 推送路由轨迹信息
wms -->> wms : [060] 轨迹处理和封装
wms -->> wms : [070] 记录运单信息更新状态

alt 路由最终状态
    wms -->> tradecenter : <color:red>[080]</color>  通知订单发货单的路由状态
else 非最终状态
end

@enduml
```
